creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
This patch shouldn't be applied unconditionally, because the missing
functions are in 9-CURRENT (for OSVERSION > 900026 although they
haven't been merged, presumably because das@ was busy, and no one else
noticed):

http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base?view=revision&revision=216211
http://svn.freebsd.org/viewvc/base?view=revision&revision=216212

Also, while I think that the new expression in the patch is formally
correct, I wonder if there was a reason why the original calculation
was split into parts.  Probably the new expression should be checked
to make sure that no parts of it will {over,under}flow, or lose
precision due to round-off.

b.
